subcodes.first_line: O Ali! On this Day the Tree of Divine Utterance, which hath been planted by the Hand of Divine Grace in the midmost heart of Paradise, speaketh forth this most exalted Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی امروز سدره بیان که در قطب جنان بید فضل غرس شده باین کلمه علیا ناطق
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @suffering and imprisonment
